# unifi_wan (List Resource)

List WAN networks in a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all WAN networks in the default site
list "unifi_wan" "all" {
  provider = unifi
}

# List WAN networks in a specific site
list "unifi_wan" "site_wans" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    site = "my-site"
  }
}

# List WAN networks filtered by name
list "unifi_wan" "filtered" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    filter {
      name  = "name"
      value = "WAN"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `site` (String) The name of the site to list WAN networks from.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) The name of the filter to apply. Supported values are: `name`.
- `value` (String) The value to filter by.
